text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, when visiting the library...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Please... I beseech you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O? This is a library...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A thousand pardons. To violate the library's
code of conduct is a betrayal of beauty itself. As
such... Ahem...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Please... I beseech you...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um, your voice is softer this time, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, fine trainer. Assist me in my endeavor, would
you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For she is the scholar of songs who holds
knowledge of the composition I seek.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-that phrasing is somewhat perplexing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I ask for a quick summary to get up to speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, T.M. Opera O has come here to
ask Zenno Rob Roy for opera recommendations.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
She is a veritable fountain of knowledge! I would
invite her expertise for the benefit of my
dramaturgy!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Th-that's... You're exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I-I simply like to read books. I'm nowhere near
qualified to handle such a high request.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh? W-well, yes... you are.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Then no other words are necessary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy is beyond confused. It looks like I
need to step in.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There are none. When an assessment is made, it
must be made rightly. Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rob Roy, your intimate knowledge of books runs
deep. You should be praised for it and proud of
it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Never should it be taken lightly, even by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: You both think so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, I beg of you once again—might you
recommend a play worthy of one such as I?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll pick what I consider to be the finest
of works!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy comes back with two scripts of
recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The one we decide to read first is...
choice_data_list: An epic about a racing deity.
The tale of a heroic savior of the people.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, what a coincidence. I have been
meaning to read that very one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O and I absorb ourselves in the story.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What is it thou desires?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Speed? So be it... Now, go forth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what's come over T.M. Opera O, but
it's having a positive effect on her running.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, what a coincidence. I have been
meaning to read that very one!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, Opera O! I've procured another book for you
today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Thank you... Hehe, I can hardly wait to read
it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I have the urge to read more heroic tales.
People yearn for heroes of all shapes and sizes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... It seems the hero of her dreams and I, the
Overlord, somewhat differ.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reading books seems to have helped T.M. Opera
O come to a realization.
